explanation.uz: 0 — 'falsy' qiymat (false kabi ishlaydi). Shuning uchun if(x) sharti false bo'ladi va else bloki ishlaydi → "B". Falsy qiymatlar: 0, "", null, undefined, NaN, false.
explanation.en: 0 is a 'falsy' value (behaves like false). So if(x) is false and the else block runs → "B". Falsy values: 0, "", null, undefined, NaN, false.

explanation.uz: i 0 dan boshlanadi va i < 5 shart bajarilguncha ishlaydi: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 — jami 5 marta. i=5 bo'lganda shart false bo'lib to'xtaydi.
explanation.en: i starts at 0 and runs while i < 5: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 — 5 times total. When i=5 the condition becomes false and it stops.

explanation.uz: while sikli i < 3 bo'lguncha ishlaydi. i 0, 1, 2 qiymatlarida chop etiladi, i=3 bo'lganda shart false bo'ladi. Natija: 0 1 2.
explanation.en: The while loop runs while i < 3. It prints i for 0, 1, 2; when i=3 the condition is false. Result: 0 1 2.

explanation.uz: `break` yo'qligi sababli 'fall-through' yuz beradi: case 2 dan boshlab, keyingi barcha caselar ham ishlaydi. Natija: two, three, other. Har case oxiriga break qo'yilsa faqat "two" chiqardi.
explanation.en: Without `break`, 'fall-through' happens: from case 2 onward, all following cases also run. Result: two, three, other. With a break in each case, only "two" would print.

explanation.uz: `continue` joriy iteratsiyani o'tkazib yuboradi. i === 2 bo'lganda console.log bajarilmaydi, lekin sikl davom etadi. Natija: 0 1 3 4.
explanation.en: `continue` skips the current iteration. When i === 2, console.log is skipped but the loop continues. Result: 0 1 3 4.

explanation.uz: Bu ternar (uch amalli) operator: shart ? true_qiymat : false_qiymat. 5 > 3 true bo'lgani uchun "yes" qaytadi.
explanation.en: This is the ternary operator: condition ? valueIfTrue : valueIfFalse. Since 5 > 3 is true, it returns "yes".

explanation.uz: `do...while` avval tanani BAJARADI, keyin shartni tekshiradi. Shuning uchun shart (5 < 3) noto'g'ri bo'lsa ham, sikl kamida bir marta ishlaydi → 5.
explanation.en: `do...while` runs the body FIRST, then checks the condition. So even though the condition (5 < 3) is false, the loop runs at least once → 5.

explanation.uz: `for...of` massiv QIYMATLARI bo'yicha aylanadi: 10, 20, 30. (Indekslar uchun for...in ishlatiladi.)
explanation.en: `for...of` iterates over the array VALUES: 10, 20, 30. (Use for...in for indices.)

explanation.uz: `for...in` INDEKSLAR (kalitlar) bo'yicha aylanadi: 0, 1, 2 (string ko'rinishida). Qiymatlar uchun for...of ishlatiladi.
explanation.en: `for...in` iterates over the INDICES (keys): 0, 1, 2 (as strings). Use for...of for values.

explanation.uz: `break` siklni butunlay to'xtatadi. i === 3 bo'lganda break ishga tushadi, shuning uchun faqat 0, 1, 2 chop etiladi.
explanation.en: `break` stops the loop entirely. When i === 3, break fires, so only 0, 1, 2 are printed.

explanation.uz: Ichma-ich sikl: tashqi 3 marta, har safar ichki 2 martadan ishlaydi. 3 × 2 = 6 marta c oshadi.
explanation.en: Nested loop: the outer runs 3 times, and the inner runs 2 times each. 3 × 2 = 6 increments of c.

explanation.uz: "b" case "b" ga mos keladi → 2 chop etiladi. `break` borligi sababli keyingi caselarga o'tmaydi.
explanation.en: "b" matches case "b" → prints 2. Because of `break`, it does not fall through to the next cases.

explanation.uz: x < 10 noto'g'ri, keyingi shart x < 20 → 15 < 20 → true, shuning uchun "mid" chiqadi va qolgan bloklar tekshirilmaydi.
explanation.en: x < 10 is false; the next condition x < 20 → 15 < 20 → true, so "mid" prints and the remaining branches aren't checked.

explanation.uz: `while` shartni AVVAL tekshiradi. 0 > 5 noto'g'ri, shuning uchun tana umuman ishlamaydi — faqat "done" chiqadi.
explanation.en: `while` checks the condition FIRST. 0 > 5 is false, so the body never runs — only "done" prints.

explanation.uz: i 1 dan 4 gacha yig'iladi: 1 + 2 + 3 + 4 = 10.
explanation.en: i is summed from 1 to 4: 1 + 2 + 3 + 4 = 10.

explanation.uz: Ichma-ich ternar: n > 0 noto'g'ri → ikkinchi ternarga o'tadi: n < 0 ham noto'g'ri → "zero" qaytadi.
explanation.en: Nested ternary: n > 0 is false → move to the second ternary: n < 0 is also false → returns "zero".

explanation.uz: String ham iteratsiya qilinadi. for...of har bir belgi bo'yicha aylanadi: 'a', 'b', 'c' — 3 marta.
explanation.en: Strings are iterable too. for...of loops over each character: 'a', 'b', 'c' — 3 times.

explanation.uz: Bo'sh massiv `[]` — obyekt, obyektlar esa har doim TRUTHY. Shuning uchun shart true bo'lib "yes" chiqadi (garchi massiv bo'sh bo'lsa ham).
explanation.en: An empty array `[]` is an object, and objects are always TRUTHY. So the condition is true and "yes" prints (even though the array is empty).

explanation.uz: `switch` case'larni `===` (qat'iy tenglik) bilan solishtiradi. 1 (number) "1" (string) ga teng emas, faqat `case 1` ga mos keladi → "number".
explanation.en: `switch` compares cases with `===` (strict equality). 1 (number) is not equal to "1" (string); it only matches `case 1` → "number".

explanation.uz: `for(;;)` — shartsiz (cheksiz) sikl, lekin ichida break bor. i 0 va 1 da chop etiladi, i=2 bo'lganda break to'xtatadi → 0 1.
explanation.en: `for(;;)` is an unconditional (infinite) loop, but it has a break inside. i prints for 0 and 1; when i=2 the break stops it → 0 1.
